summary: Follow-up fixes are mostly present, but broad verification evidence can still map ACs through loose target/ref word matching.
inspection_summary: HEAD 72ca2bca6ca0261f3cd2557951ebff4f3a98ecaf fixed usage examples, current-bound mapped evidence metadata, and unmapped/scenario fixtures. Remaining issue: command/artifact path lexical matches still map some ACs without explicit AC/scenario binding.
inspection_evidence: node --test test/traceability-promotion.test.js test/traceability-usage-report.test.js passed: 17/17; focused reproduction showed broad verification path/command could map several ACs.
judgment_delta: unmapped AC and scenario clause fixtures -> fixed
generic broad evidence -> still open because command/artifact paths can map clauses

findings.detail: Evidence matching accepts lexical matches against item.ref and targets that include command/artifact paths; explicit AC/scenario binding should be required for mapped status.
